title: Silky Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A fresh and silky Brazilian dish perfect for a date night, featuring creme fraiche and air-fried chicken. This diabetic-friendly recipe is a delicious and healthy option for a special evening.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together creme fraiche, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Cook the chicken skewers in the air fryer for 10-12 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Serve with your favorite sides, such as grilled vegetables or quinoa.
Refrigerate or freeze any leftovers for up to 3 days.
Reheat cooked skewers in the air fryer at 350°F (180°C) for 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
